overall_assessment: The corrected-baseline authority packet is materially cleaner than the round-01 set: the earlier missing-ledger gap is replaced by explicit reconciliation and rerun ledgers, the package and TODO keep closure blocked instead of overclaiming readiness, and the claimed canonical promotions are reflected in the referenced module docs. Remaining verification debt is now concentrated in one still-open closure gate cluster plus the already-explicit historical fail-first provenance gap.
recommended_path: Use this packet as bounded rerun evidence only, keep RR-AUTH-04 blocked for closure until the remaining required review lanes, triple-audit round 02, Claude comparison, and final orchestration guards are recorded, and preserve the missing fail-first provenance as explicit accepted debt in the acceptance ledger.

findings.title: Closure evidence is still incomplete against the corrected-baseline gate set
findings.rationale: The bounded package, governing TODO, and corrected-baseline rerun ledger all state that fresh critique, security, verification-debt, test-quality, and final-review reruns must be attached, triple-audit round 02 must be reconciled, and the Claude comparison plus final orchestration guards must still be recorded before RR-AUTH-04 can close. This verification-debt result satisfies only one lane inside that still-open gate set, so any closure claim from the current packet would still outrun the authority it cites.
findings.suggested_action: Keep RR-AUTH-04 blocked for closure, attach the remaining corrected-baseline rerun artifacts and round-02 triple-audit reconciliation, then record the Claude comparison and final orchestration guards before any acceptance or pass signal.

findings.title: Historical fail-first provenance remains explicit accepted residual debt
findings.rationale: The package, TODO, and rerun ledger still state that preserved fail-first/red-run artifacts are unavailable because normalization happened after hardening had already started, and they rely instead on the assertion/evidence map plus focused and full-suite reruns as substitute proof. That is acceptable for this bounded rerun packet only if later acceptance materials continue to label it as substitute-evidence debt rather than implying preserved red-to-green history.
findings.suggested_action: Carry the missing fail-first provenance forward as explicit accepted debt in the RR-AUTH-04 acceptance ledger and avoid closure language that suggests preserved red-run/TDD history exists for this slice.
